refactor_instructions: Remove 'How-to' steps from the end of the document. Keep only the value proposition and architectural overview.
JUMP TO TOP. Detailed guide for the NLU Specialist on setting up LLM scoring, prompt tuning, and auto-audit rules.
Move to 'Strategic Value' or 'Governance'. Ensure it clearly defines the difference between Major, Minor, and Patch releases for ExpertFlow CX.
JUMP TO TOP. Clinical integration map. Remove all internal Jira IDs. Focus on signal flow between CX and Finesse.
Move to 'Infrastructure > Component Setup'. Clearly state that this is a required step after the core helm deployment to enable any reporting.
Extract technical parameters (JSON/API) into a new Reference page 'Widget-Technical-Parameters'. Focus this page on UI-based configuration.
Tag strictly for 'Partner (Host)'. Ensure it is hidden from Agent/Supervisor navigation.
Update to state that WhatsApp Cloud API is fully supported. Remove links to 360dialog/Twilio as the only options.
